ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each alert message */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., FATAL, ERROR) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Short message describing the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "control_action" TEXT /* Action to control the alert (if applicable) */,
  "threshold_count" INTEGER /* Count threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "threshold_period" INTEGER /* Time period for the threshold (in minutes) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is enabled */,
  "set_state" TEXT /* State set for the alert (if applicable) */,
  "visible_to_users" INTEGER /* Visibility status to users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., server, application) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the alert (e.g., data center, cloud region) */,
  "alert_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert group to which the alert belongs */,
  "escalation_level" INTEGER /* Level of escalation for the alert (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is enabled */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for SMS notifications */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the alert (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert */,
  "email_recipients" TEXT /* List of email recipients for notifications */,
  "sms_recipients" TEXT /* List of SMS recipients for notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_group_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert group */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_group_membership_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_group_membership_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES alert_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., escalate, resolve) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the action taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_actions_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Reference to the alert message */,
  "threshold_count" INTEGER /* Count threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "threshold_period" INTEGER /* Time period for the threshold (in minutes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_msg_id FOREIGN KEY ("msg_id") REFERENCES alerts ("msg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "email_enabled" INTEGER /* Global flag to enable/disable email notifications */,
  "sms_enabled" INTEGER /* Global flag to enable/disable SMS notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
